note: V11 7100 hotfix banner. Phase 1 is already active since block 7000. Linear equalizer remains live for blocks 7000-7099. The intended triangular equalizer activates at block 7100 together with Phase 2 Lottery + SbPoW. Miner-side RPC sync bug fixed: sost-miner now resyncs when the RPC node is ahead instead of looping on fetch_lottery_state height mismatch. Miners and node operators must pull origin/main, rebuild, and restart before block 7100. From block 7100 miners must use wallet-backed mining mode (--wallet + --mining-key-label); --address only is no longer enough.
